daily.today_energy: Your intuitive radar is *on* today. Trust those gut feelings that whisper louder than logic—they're basically your spirit guides dropping hints. Channel this inner knowing into whatever you're building.
daily.love: There's a softness in the air around your connections. If you've been holding back vulnerability, today's the day to let someone in. Real intimacy happens when you stop performing and just... exist.
daily.career: Your creativity is the secret weapon right now. Don't dim it to fit the room—lean into those unconventional ideas that make you feel alive. Your unique perspective is literally what you're here to offer.
daily.health: Your body's asking for slowness today. Honor that. Whether it's extra sleep, gentle movement, or just sitting with your thoughts, rest isn't laziness—it's how you recharge your whole system.

weekly.overview: Your intuition is basically leveling up this week. Mercury's vibe is pushing you to trust those gut feelings that usually hit different. Expect clarity in places where you've been sitting with confusion.
weekly.love: Whether you're coupled up or manifesting, this week asks you to be vulnerable in a way that actually feels safe. Someone's about to show up for you—or you'll realize someone already has been.
weekly.career: Your creative energy is unmatched right now. This is the moment to pitch that idea or take on a project that's been living rent-free in your head. Your unique perspective is literally what people need.
weekly.health: Your body's asking for gentleness this week. Rest isn't laziness—it's actually the move. Lean into activities that feel nourishing rather than punishing. Flow over force.
